content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed tests/unit/br_adapter_test.rs (770 lines, 16 tests) and tests/unit/bv_adapter_test.rs (379 lines, 8 tests) plus the tests/unit.rs harness hookup. Total 24 new tests — within the 18-24 range from the bead. Ran `cargo test --test unit`: all 864 tests pass (including the new 24). The implementation meets every acceptance criterion: both happy-path and error-path coverage for br and bv adapters; mock ProcessRunner/BvProcessRunner implementations that record actual calls and assert on expected args; command-line construction, JSON parsing, and error-variant surfacing are all verified; mutation tests verify pending-mutation journal (.beads/.br-unsynced-mutations.d/<adapter_id>.json) and legacy marker (.beads/.br-unsynced-mutations) discipline for both success and failure paths; clear assertion messages on failure; no real br or bv processes spawned; no existing source modified; no new dependencies introduced. BrError::BrExitError, BrParseError, BrTimeout, and BrNotFound variants are all exercised with field-by-field preservation assertions, including stdout/stderr/command/timeout_ms context. The successful sync_flush test verifies both per-adapter journal record removal and legacy marker cleanup; the failure-case test verifies both survive for safe retry alongside adapter.has_pending_mutations() remaining true. Clippy errors exist pre-existing in src/ (type_complexity, await_holding_lock, items_after_test_module, etc.) but none originate from the new test files — these are out of scope for this additive bead. Minor test-quality observations (not amendments): several happy-path tests use locally defined ad-hoc structs (DependencyTreeNode, WorkspaceGraph, EmptyNextSignal, BlockedGraphSignal) rather than production types like DepTreeNode, which slightly weakens the compatibility guarantee with real br/bv output formats; these still validate adapter dispatch and serde pass-through but could be strengthened in a follow-up. No critical defects, no correctness gaps, no safety problems, no amendments proposed.

## Amendments

None.
